description.overview: The most energetic of the Swiss Mountain Dogs, Appenzellers are reliable, fearless herding dogs. They're lively, active companions.
description.history: The Appenzeller Sennenhund originated in Switzerland.
description.temperament: Known for being reliable, fearless, energetic.
description.grooming: Requires regular grooming appropriate for their double coat, short coat.
description.exercise: Exercise needs match their energy level.

verdict.summary: The most energetic of the Swiss Mountain Dogs, Appenzellers are reliable, fearless herding dogs. They're lively, active companions.
